seoTitle: Amherst vs Amphitheatre — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Amherst and Amphitheatre. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Amherst and Amphitheatre.
heading: Amherst vs Amphitheatre — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Amherst, Victoria and Amphitheatre, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Amherst has a lower overall climate risk score (29/100) compared to Amphitheatre (32/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Amherst or Amphitheatre safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Amherst has a flood risk score of 32/100, while Amphitheatre scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Amherst scores 15/100 for bushfire risk. Amphitheatre scores 19/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Amherst or Amphitheatre?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Amherst has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.22% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
